536_7_6:
Every month, the moon descends to earth 
and sits atop the temple roof
She bleeds milk and worms.
536_7_11:
The village cats line up to lick it, 
hoping for sweet dreams.
One night, one of them dares to ask her, 
'Do you dream, moon?'
536_7_16:
She crushes him with a giant foot 
she didn’t have before.
'Yes,' she says. 'I dream that none 
of you exist anymore.'
536_7_20:
...And that’s just how life was in 
my village, out in the 
Free States of the Midwest.
536_7_24:
I fuckin' love America dude, but Old Europe is
pretty neat.
536_7_30:
I fuckin' love America dudette, but Old Europe is
pretty neat.
536_7_36:
I fuckin' love America dud*, but Old Europe is
pretty neat.
536_8_5: Good luck and DON'T fuck it up!
536_12_5:
Based on my exploration experience:
Level A floors (1-9) have all a central hub zone
and many zones connected to them
536_12_8:
Level B floors (11-19) are largely series of 
connected spaces, with no clear central hub
536_12_12:
Level C (21-29) floors are....sprawling.
They are huge areas where you can just get lost
easily
536_12_32: I haven't explored further than that.
536_12_38: I haven't explored further than that.
536_15_5: Access to the server room is prohibithed.
536_17_6:
If you come across a high level that can one-shot
you and your friends, you should flee before
anybody get hurt.
536_20_5: Whoa! You trekked all the way to the tower?
536_20_8:
Didn't you know that there is a easier way to
get to the tower? Just take the Hypermetro!
536_20_11:
How did you manage to survive the arcane mist 
and stuff in the first place?
536_21_7:
I'm trying to make this tower self sufficient 
you know?
536_21_10:
The Hypermetro is the only lifeline
connecting this place to the rest of the world.
536_21_15:
But what happens if a PSIterrorist dedices to
blow up the tunnels? We will be all starve to death
or be forced to eat monsters that lives in
upper floors
536_22_8:
When you're stocked up and feel ready, 
you can begin exploring by going to the Hypernet
point upstairs
536_22_12:
Be warned, though, each floor above us follows its own rules. 
Gravity gets weird, logic bends in weird ways, 
and time itself may lose its grip.
536_22_14: But that's exactly why you're here, isn't it?
536_26_5:
They raised fares again, and for what?
I've already owe Esoteric Heavy Industries
like 15% of my soul.
536_27_4:
I love the quiet up here, away from the upper
layers noise.
558_10_3:
I watched my man rot away inside that mutt
day by day.
558_10_6:
I miss when he did the damn dishes.
Let the elder gods sort him out.
558_10_10:
Wasn’t quick, naw. First, his nails curled 
back ' split like old kindling, then teeth 
fell out in chunks.
558_10_13:
He screamed like I never heard before, not even 
when our son died in the Psychic Wars.
558_10_17:
I held him while his legs bent wrong 
ways an’ his jaw stretched out like taffy. 
Screamin’ turned to whimperin’.
558_10_21:
So listen: take him into the dungeon.
Let him die in glory, not pissin’ on his
own paws.
558_10_24:
And don’t bring him back, ye hear? 
He’s already gone.
558_29_3:
In this wagon you can get implants installed,
is not really igienic compared to a proper clinic.
558_30_4:
Visit the \C[1]Growing tent\C[0] to grow your
plants and get a common share of all plants
planted by other explorers.
560_4_4:
We bake everything right here, no frozen 
shipped stuff from the continent.
566_2_4:
Interact with the \C[1]Globe\C[0] to
travel to the world map.
566_2_7:
Be careful: since the Y2K event,
the world is a mess.
566_2_11:
There are roaming monsters even
more dangerous of the ones you
will find in the Omega Tower.
566_2_14:
Just use the Hypermetro like any
sane human being ok?
566_3_6:
\c[1]STR\c[0] is your Strength.
It determines the damage of physical
attacks and skills.
566_3_10:
\c[1]CON\c[0] is your Constitution.
It determines your physical defenses
and how much you can carry.
566_3_14:
\c[1]INT\c[0] is your Intelligence.
It determines the damage of magical
attacks.
566_3_17:
\c[1]WIS\c[0] is your Wisdom.
It determines your magical defenses.
566_3_20:
\c[1]DEX\c[0] is your Dexterity.
It determines your turn speed.
566_3_25:
\c[1]PSI\c[0] is your Psionics.
It determines your starting AP in
battle and your AP recovery.
It also influences Psionic skills.
566_4_3:
You can access the \C[1]Tech tree\C[0]
in the menu or by interacting with this board.
566_4_8:
Use materials to unlock permanents
upgrades to your stats, at higher
ranks you will need the help of
a team of researchers to advance.
566_5_4:
This is pretty self-explanatory...
I'm so imbararassed to give you this 
explanation but here we are.
566_5_9:
Put someting on the switch to 
activate it.
I know is the simplest puzzle
ever conceivable, but my job is
566_5_13:
to explain how it works.
Interact with movable things to
move them, or just kick them with \c[1]C\c[0]
map566_ev6_p0_idx3:
Let me talk to you about \C[1]Worthiness\C[0] and
some heavy stuff ok?
566_6_9:
The Omega Tower elevator is sentient somehow and
can take likings to certain people who 
prove their worth.
566_6_13:
It will refuse to move to a floor that your
Party has not reached yet, and sometimes if he
judges you worthy enough will show only for you
566_6_17:
"Phantom floors" that exist only for a brief time.
By studying it we recently discovered a hidden
inheritance system: \c[1]Worthiness\c[0] can
566_6_21:
be inherithed via a legally binding contract.
This is why back on the train you used to
get there we made you sign so many papers:
566_6_24:
we already choosen your successor that will take
your place if you happen to die in the Tower.
566_6_29:
Other than /c[1]Worthiness/c[0], also /c[2]Stocks/c[0]
and /c[3]Real estate/c[0] will be inherithed by
your successor, to regain your loot he must find
your body and desacrate the grave,
566_6_32:
Pretty buro-metal but that is just how things
works in the Tower under the Archive Foundation.
566_6_35:
Before we took control it was pure anarchy, a
simulacrum of the Tower of Babel.
566_6_38:
The difference now is that we are using this tower
to study the decaying corpse of God.
566_6_42:
Yes it's true, not a conspiracy theory:
The Abramitic God was murdered last year in a 
elaborate ritual named "The Solomon Ritual"
566_6_46:
It was conducted by the 3 pillars of the 
Mages Guild: Lady Margareth, Sir Alesteir 
Crowley and The Father.
566_6_50:
They used a young wannabe witch as a living
teonuclear weapon: they turned her memories into
a colossal God slaying mecha of pure light that
566_6_54:
pierced God's heart and disintegrated his soul
in quadrillions of pieces, leaving his bloated
body to orbit around Earth.
566_6_57:
It also flattened my hometown in the process but
that's another story.
566_6_61:
We could just launch a space shuttle filled with
scientists and theologists to land on God and
start taking samples...
566_6_64:
But since the Y2K event, 
space travel is impracticable.
566_6_67:
It's the Kessler Syndrome: a chain reaction
first started by the ENVISAT satellite.
566_6_70:
Everything we put in orbit get shredded by
debris and get added to the chain reaction.
566_6_74:
Sometimes also the cadaver of God get
shredded by the debris and they fall on Earth,
looking like mesmerizing comets.
566_6_79:
How do i know about all these things?
This is the Archive Foundation.
566_6_82:
We collect everything, even state secrets
and liberate the informations.
566_6_88:
It's ok, is not really your problem because the
Archive Foundation will take care of your porfolio
after you die.
566_6_91:
You signed away basically all
your inheritance rights do you remember?
566_22_3:
The rest of the world is still a work in progress,
come back when the full game releases!
566_23_3:
\C[1]Skills\C[0] are grouped in two 
main categories: \C[2]Abilities\C[0] and \C[3]Magic\C[0]
566_23_7:
\C[1]Abilities\C[0] uses AP that are
gained on each turn based on 
your \C[3]PSI\C[0] stat
566_23_11:
\C[2]Magic\C[0] uses MP, there are
also hybrid abilities that uses
both MP and AP.
566_25_5:
Use the \I[38]\C[1]Thinker\C[0] option in
the menu to start crafting and
disassembling items.
566_25_10:
Every item needs a certain amount
of materials to be crafted.
The rarer the item the higher the amount
of materials needed.
566_25_13:
You can also disassemble items you
no longer use to obtain some materials.
566_25_16:
To collect materials slay monsters and
examine every nook and cranny of the world!
566_26_6:
Use the\C[1]Computer\C[0] to
access the Hypernet, view the 
Stock market and many other 
marvelous things.
566_26_11:
When investing remember this: \C[1]OIL\C[0]
is a extremely volatile stock,
\C[2]SOUL\C[0] is more stable but the value
can change based on current news.
566_26_15:
\C[2]SOUL\C[0] price directly influence
the tariff on imported goods ordered
online.
566_26_20:
The Omega Tower is designed by the
European Commission as a neutral zone
between the Hyperpowers and we get so
many combined tariffs!
566_26_24:
Back to the explanation: when you have
ammassed a large amount of capital
you can try investing in \c[3]Real estate\c[0].
566_26_29:
Buy properties around Europe and get
tenants that will pay a daily rent.
Price and attractiveness is influenced
by local news on the city you bought property.
566_27_3:
During battle you can sever or destroy
the limbs of a enemy, affecting their stats.
566_27_6:
If you sever a vital part of a enemy
during battle it will die in one hit.
566_27_9:
Some enemies have multiple vital parts, such
as Hydras and double headed enemies.
566_27_13:
You are also composed of squishy organs!
Enemy attacks can break your bones and
puncture your internal organs.
566_27_16:
Check the \I[34]\C[1]Health Status\C[0] option
in menu do to a self check of you all body parts.
566_27_20:
If you have too many broken parts
your stats will be reduced to a point
where you are useless in battle.
566_27_23:
Be sure to heal them, rest or
visit a doctor before you die for real!
566_28_4:
Check the blackboard to learn
about states, there are too many
to even begin remembering them...
566_35_3:
Select \I[140]\c[1]Cooking\c[0] from main menu to
start cooking delicious meals for your party!
566_35_7:
Just pick two ingredients at random: since
the Y2K event we lost all online recipes so
we need to start from the stone age of cooking.
566_35_11:
Ever tried a Kebab Bolognese or some
Pinapple Krauts? You can also throw healing
items and drugs in the mix, you mileage may vary!
566_35_14:
Check the \I[96] icon in the pause menu
to see how hungry you and your party is.
566_37_4:
You can learn new skills by going in
the \I[34]\C[1]Training\C[0] of the main menu.
566_37_9:
Skills that your class is proficient on
will have a learning speed bonus: 
\c[1]Primary skills\c[0] have a 4x bonus
and \c[1]Secondary skills\c[0] have a 2x bonus.
566_37_13:
You can also learn skills outside your
class specialization but the learning
process will at nornal speed.
566_37_16:
Find trainers and fight monsters to gain
experience in the currently trained skill.
566_50_4:
Getting a lil' sleepy while deep into the Omega
Tower can be a death sentence, be sure to rest
regularly.
566_50_7:
Find inns and beds to get a full rest, you can
also buy camp equipment to set up your camp.
566_50_12:
The safest option is to sleep in the camp we set
in the elevator: monsters are repelled by the 
presence of the elevator and is the only reason
the Tower's base floor is not flooded with monsters.
566_50_15:
You can also restore some sleep by drinking 
coffee or using stimulants and combat drugs.
566_50_18:
Also...if you happen to become undead you will
no longer need to sleep.
566_50_21:
Check the \I[66] icon in the pause menu
to see how sleepy you are.
566_50_24:
Don't worry about me, i'll just watch you
ween you sleep :)
566_53_4:
You can learn new skills by going in
the \C[1]Training\C[0] of the main menu.
566_53_9:
Skills that your class is proficient on
will have a learning speed bonus: 
\c[1]Primary skills\c[0] have a 4x bonus
and \c[1]Secondary skills\c[0] have a 2x bonus.
566_53_13:
You can also learn skills outside your
class specialization but the learning
process will at nornal speed.
566_53_16:
Find trainers and fight monsters to gain
experience in the currently trained skill.
570_1_8: Whoa! That's great i also love fishing!
570_1_13:
Do you happen also to like...cocaine?
Don't worry it's in a legal gray area
at the Omega Tower, not right out
illegal!
570_1_25: Get out of my hut right now.
571_2_4:
Use \C[1]Target\C[0] in battle to check the
elemental weaknesses of a enemy.
571_2_12:
Both magic and physical attacks can inflict
elemental damage, there are also some classes like
the Nun that will inflict always Holy damage.
571_9_4:
Use \C[1]Target\C[0] in battle to check the
elemental weaknesses of a enemy.
571_9_8:
Just remember this: if a companion falls in battle
you have until the battle end to try to stabilize
and revive him.
573_1_11: Nun beer six pack was found!
574_2_6:
If you come across a high level that can one-shot
you and your friends, you should flee before
anybody get hurt.
map596_ev12_p0_idx4: Do you want to board the train?
618_29_4:
Are you directed to the Omega Tower?
Me too! I hope to meet you in the dungeon.
618_32_6:
Human-Goblin relationship has evolved since they
discovered Norwegian death metal.
618_32_11:
I shortly worked as a cultural mediator for
the Archive Foundation until i broke my
freakin' neck with too much synchronized
headbanging.
618_32_15:
Did you know that Goblins and Humans shares
a common ancestor? They diverged tens of million
of years ago and moved undeground.
618_32_20:
We made contact with them again only
in the '70, after the soviets drilled
the Kola Superdeep Borehole and 
accidentaly revealed their kingdom.
618_33_4:
Information wants to be free like water wants 
to flow downhill.
618_33_8:
They both can fill your basement and ruin
your life and all your memories, so be 
careful handling both!
618_34_6:
That new restaurant in \C[1]Ghent Downtown\C[0]
makes some incredible stuff!
618_34_10:
The owner jokes that the recipes survived the 
millennium because his grandmother wrote them
properly CamelCased.
618_35_7:
Speed limit used to mean something.
Now it means the difference between existing and
not existing
618_35_11:
Since the Squishing started, if you move from
40km/h to 79km/h you just end up stuck in a time
loop bubble, and this can be very nasty.
618_35_14:
So the only safe way to travel between cities
is to move at a minimum speed of 80km/h
618_35_18:
Or you can just walk from city to city,
but this take forever and leave you exposed
to random monster attacks.
618_36_8:
The Omega Tower makes you really think about scale and 
perspective.
We're just ants looking up at infinity.
618_36_11:
Not jus that is really infinite. but is at least
Luxembourg-sized.
618_36_15:
It just fell from the sky during the Y2k event,
crushed many cities under her weight and killed
tens of thousand of people.
618_36_20:
But is a good thing: both scientists and
theologians concord on the fact that the
Tower is the only thing keeping the 92
dimensions of space from falling into
618_36_25:
baseline reality.
Let's say it works like the flag they put
on hamburgers to avoid parts of it falling
all over the place when you try to eat it.
618_36_29:
This but on a dimensional scale: the Tower
pierces through the dimensions just like that
Stephen King novel where he self-inserted.
618_38_8:
Have you seen the price of OIL stocks lately? 
Makes you wonder if there really is something 
to all those rumors about oil being sentient
and having its own agenda.
618_39_2: I'm bored, i'll go to the Casino in Downtown
618_41_7:
I'm cataloging for the Archive Foundation
every time someone says 'basically' when they
mean 'specifically.'
618_41_9: It's an hard work but is honest work.
618_47_6:
If you come across a high level that can one-shot
you and your friends, you should flee before
anybody get hurt.
620_1_6:
If you come across a high level that can one-shot
you and your friends, you should flee before
anybody get hurt.
620_13_32:
In \C[1]Permadeath mode\C[0] if your character perish in battle
you will have to create a new one.
Loot the body of your past character to recover items and
euros.
620_13_37:
In \C[1]Standard mode\C[0] if your character get defeated
during battle will rewake at the base floor of the dungeon.
Your allies will still die if they are not resurrected
by the end of the battle.
631_57_3:
This is the \C[1]Omega City\C[0], claimed by the \C[1]Mages Guild\C[0]
as their headquarters in the Omega Tower.
688_1_6:
If you come across a high level that can one-shot
you and your friends, you should flee before
anybody get hurt.
688_13_32:
In \C[1]Permadeath mode\C[0] if your character perish in battle
you will have to create a new one.
Loot the body of your past character to recover items and
euros.
688_13_37:
In \C[1]Standard mode\C[0] if your character get defeated
during battle will rewake at the base floor of the dungeon.
Your allies will still die if they are not resurrected
by the end of the battle.
map689_ev208_p0_idx2: Inns are a good place to recruit party members.

Visit the shop tunnel to stock up on items

689_212_4:

capitol of the \C[1]Mages Guild\C[0].
All services are reserved for members.
689_213_3:
Visit the shop tunnel to stock up on items

689_222_3:
Interact with the sign to fast travel around

702_13_4:
Use the Utilitarian car keys to summon
the car, press SPACE in front of the car
to enter it.
702_13_6: You can only drive on road, grass or dirt.
702_13_10:
Find gas stations to refuel the car and
press ESC or RIGHT MOUSE BUTTON when driving
to access the car menu.
702_13_14:
In this menu you can refuel the car if near a
gas station, repair the internals, access the
trunk storage and enter the car to sleep there.
704_50_3:
This is your car, use it to travel around the
world and stay safe from monsters.
704_56_4:
I have been filing tax returns in my dreams
for weeks now.
704_57_6:
If you want to practice your dungeon crawling
skills you can try the Clock Tower in this square.
704_57_11:
It's a very easy dungeon and is clockwork based:
it auto resets every day at midnight, so new 
adventures stopping at Ghent can try this before
the dungeon of the Omega Tower
704_58_7:
They are sentient being and deverse citizen rights.
It's even more absurd than the goblin situation:
we have fully integrated goblins in our society but we
704_58_10:
still keeping butchering the wild ones with no
remorse or regards for goblin life.
704_127_3:
Interact with the bus to travel around
the world.
704_128_3:
The Clock Tower is the perfect starting
dungeon for a newbie.
704_129_3:
This is the tutorial center, here you can
learn about all advanced mechanics.
704_130_3:
Just be careful around faries ok?
Check in the Help menu about their lore.
704_131_4:
Continue north to reach the \C[1]City center of

to the right for the \C[1]Hospital

map708_ev14_p0_idx4: Do you want to board the train?
708_115_4:
Board the train to the Omega Tower where the
dungeon awaits you. Before departing make sure
to visit Ghent and stock up.
708_116_2: Interact with the lockers to store or retrieve items.
708_117_4:
This bar is a meeting place for adventurers
stopping at Ghent before heading to the Omega
Tower, you can buy there all the basic items
708_117_8:
and some weapons you will need for your adventure.
There are many shops around this station and
the city of Ghent.
708_118_3:
Interact with the ticket office to
buy a train ticket.
709_6_4:
My kid's teacher called, said she's been 
drawing things before they happen. 
Wants her tested for PSI powers.
709_6_8:
I told the teacher that PSI powers don't
exists: they were a coverup for real magical
powers made by intelligence agencies.
709_7_5:
My ex moved to one of those new gated
communities. Very exclusive, she says. 
Has to follow strict rules about lawnmowing
and hours where to keep the music down.
709_7_7: Sounds just like a cult to me.
709_8_4:
My wife thinks I drink too much but
honestly this bar's the only place that 
feels normal anymore.
709_28_2: Rent a room to save your game and rest.
709_29_4:
The vendor on the left sells essential items
that will help you in your adventure, such as
cooking utentils, bestiaries, fishing rods and more
709_29_6: The vendor on the right sells
709_30_2: Drinking coffee reduces your sleep meter.
710_20_21:
Good! But this is a terrible spot for
fishing, you should visit Antwerpen.
710_20_25:
Before the Y2K event it was located 85km
away from the North Sea, and now is a beach
city.
710_20_28:
It was not the sea receding: the town shifted
toward the sea.
710_20_31:
If that is crazy for you, is nothing compared
to what happened to Bruxelles...
710_20_36:
Then were is your fishing rod?
Are you more on the spear fishing type?
710_20_39:
It's 2001, we have evolved past neolithic!
Just get one from the \C[1]Hardware Store\C[0].
711_32_3:
Talk to other explorers to invite them to
your party.
712_33_3:
Interact with the door of a room when you
are inside a inn to rent the room for one day.
712_42_2: Interact with a WC to empty your bladder.
712_43_2: Visit butcheries to stock up on meat.
712_44_2: Interact with the piano to play.
715_40_4:
You can train your stats by exercizing
everyday, you will get a temporary buff
that will fadeoff the more days you
715_41_4:
Visit music stores to buy EPs, crystallized

715_42_3:
Visit bait shops to buy fishing rods
and fishing related items.
715_43_2: Visit gun stores to try and buy new weapons.
715_44_3:
Visit costumes stores to buy clothes and
armours.
715_45_4:
Visit bakeries to stock up on food and
buy cooking utensils to be able to cook
food when exploring.
715_46_2: Visit butcheries to stock up on meat.
715_49_3:
Interact with the map to fast travel around
the city or go to the world map.
718_26_3:
Wait until you arrive and then exit the train
from the door.
722_1_4:
I will never forgive you for what have
you done to Bubba, prepare to die painfully.
722_1_9:
Prepare to have every bone of your body
turned into cookies!
722_2_5:
Do you think you killed Em?
Ah! Witches can't die, even a complete idiot
knows this fact!
722_2_10:
Now i'll send you to hell by blasting your
skull with my shothun, you'll arrive there even before
Em manages to escape again, i hope that even in
the afterlife manages to kill you again.
722_2_14: Sorry mate, no messing with the Beast.
722_3_10:
(>.<) oh nooooo! the beast is making sad
 mechanical noises! ♪(´▽｀) did we run 
out of sparkly fuel?
722_3_17:
Yep. Liminal engine fuel's all tapped out. 
Should've stopped at the last leyline 
intersection,
722_3_22: 🐰💫 maybe the beast is just... taking a nap?
722_3_29:
I wish it were that simple, darlin'.
 We're stuck here until we can find some more 
fuel or figure out an alternative.
722_3_37:
(╯°□°）╯ the stupid oil-beast is hogging 
ALL the fuel lines! 🐰💢
 it's being a big meanie and making 
everything go WRONG!
722_3_44:
hat there petrodemon's made itself right at home in the 
fuel reservoir. Can't get so much as a 
trickle while that critter's muckin' about.
722_3_50:
think you're tough enough to help kick this monster's butt?! 
we NEED that fuel and it's being RUDE!
722_3_58:
Now hold your horses there, partner. Fair
 warnin' - if you're fixin' to ride with us, 
you get the whole dang package. Em and me,
 we're tighter than bark on a tree.
722_3_66:
(｀皿´) that's RIGHT! 🐰💥
 you don't get bubba without em! we're 
STUCK together like... like... 
really sticky things that are REALLY stuck!
722_30_7:
The fuel pump is blocked by the presence of
a Petrodemon
722_36_5: Ehi mate that the fuck are you doing?
722_44_7:
The fuel pump is blocked by the presence of
a Petrodemon
723_142_5:
I'm having an hard time to solve this puzzle
want to join forces?

988_2_3:
I'm conducting an important socio-experiment
and this is my private property, go away please!
989_2_3:
I'm conducting an important socio-experiment
and this is my private property, go away please!
990_2_3:
I'm conducting an important socio-experiment
and this is my private property, go away please!
993_4_3:
We bake everything right here, no frozen 
shipped stuff from the continent.
1022_12_3:
Go upstairs, you can reach the roof and see
the Omega Tower in all her glory!
1023_63_4:
Visit the hospital to heal your body parts,
install implants, change your gender and
much more.
map1025_ev11_p0_idx4:
Please sit on the operating table, i can't
wait to cut you up and mess around :D
1025_12_4:
Please enter the operating room to get
an implant.
map1027_ev23_p0_idx5:
Welcome to the fertility center, how
can i help  you?
1027_23_11:
Almost 2 billion people died during the Y2K
event, we have a world to repopulate and 
everyone needs to do their part.
1027_23_15:
We also serve people with an oviparous
reproductive system and we can watch your
eggs until they hatch.
1027_23_18:
If your body can't get pregnant, please 
donate your sperm or get an uterus implant!
1027_23_25: Before you access our sperm database...
map1027_ev23_p0_idx29:
Are you aware of all the side effects
of bearing a child?
1027_23_35:
Ok perfect!
Let me guide you in our database...
1027_23_48:
Well is not really a problem, we are getting
payed to assist you in your pregnancy, just
follow our advice ok?
1027_23_55:
From the start your hormones spike so 
hard that nausea and vomiting become routine.
1027_23_59:
Your organs literally shift to make space. 
The uterus or oviduct pushes against the
bladder so you need to urinate all the time
1027_23_63:
even at night, which destroys sleep.
Complications such as anemia and gestational 
diabetes can appear without warning.
1027_23_67:
After birth your hormones crash, leading 
to mood swings, emotional instability, and 
a real risk of postpartum depression.
1027_23_115:
Please enter the room behind me and try
our offered climax-reaching methods.
1027_23_122:
If you are feeling a bit nostalgic we have a 
selection of rare pre Y2K VHS that survived
the event.
1027_23_126:
Also, we are calling it "Donation" but 
is just for tax reduction, you are getting
payed for any of your donations.
1027_23_135:
You can only donate one time per day,
sperm cells needs time to regenerate.
1027_23_141:
Please enter the room behind me and
collect your sample.
1027_23_148:
To donate your sperm, first you will need
testicles to produce it.
1027_23_151:
You can get testicles implanted by going
in the surgery room.
1036_173_3:
If you commit crimes and have a high enough
bounty, police will come after you.
1036_173_7:
If you get caught you can request a trial,
go straight to jail or pay your bounty and go
free.
1036_174_3:
Book helicopter rides to fast travel to any
location in the world.
1036_175_2: Visit botiques to buy armours and clothes.
1036_176_3:
Visit hypermarkets to stock up on a large
quantity of items.
1036_177_2: Visit pharmacies to stock up on healing items.
1036_178_3:
Visit restaurants to buy food, socialize
with your party or work part-time there.
1039_44_4:
This dungeon is recomended for a level 10+ party,
but you can still try to loot it at a low level
by avoiding fights.
map1043_ev21_p0_idx4: Do you want to board the train?
1071_10_5:
Don't pray too loud.
Something might actually answer, and you
won't like what it has to say.
1078_115_3:
Visit hypermarkets to stock up on a large
quantity of items.
1078_116_3:
Visit flower shops to buy plants, seeds and 
farming equipment.
1078_116_6:
There is an abandoned farm in \C[0]Ghent Fields\C[0]
that you can reclaim.
1078_126_2: Use gas pumps to refuel cars and RVs
1086_82_11: Scroll of Elder Names was found!
1092_2_4:
Interact with the \C[1]Globe\C[0] to
travel to the world map.
1092_2_7:
Be careful: since the Y2K event,
the world is a mess.
1092_2_11:
There are roaming monsters even
more dangerous of the ones you
will find in the Omega Tower.
1092_2_14:
Just use the Hypermetro like any
sane human being ok?
1092_3_7:
\c[1]STR\c[0] is your Strength.
It determines the damage of physical
attacks and skills.
1092_3_11:
\c[1]CON\c[0] is your Constitution.
It determines your physical defenses
and how much you can carry.
1092_3_15:
\c[1]INT\c[0] is your Intelligence.
It determines the damage of magical
attacks.
1092_3_18:
\c[1]WIS\c[0] is your Wisdom.
It determines your magical defenses.
1092_3_21:
\c[1]DEX\c[0] is your Dexterity.
It determines your turn speed.
1092_3_26:
\c[1]PSI\c[0] is your Psionics.
It determines your starting AP in
battle and your AP recovery.
It also influences Psionic skills.
1092_4_4:
You can access the \C[1]Tech tree\C[0]
in the menu or by interacting with this board.
1092_4_9:
Use materials to unlock permanents
upgrades to your stats, at higher
ranks you will need the help of
a team of researchers to advance.
1092_5_5:
This is pretty self-explanatory...
I'm so imbararassed to give you this 
explanation but here we are.
1092_5_10:
Put someting on the switch to 
activate it.
I know is the simplest puzzle
ever conceivable, but my job is
1092_5_14:
to explain how it works.
Interact with movable things to
move them, or just kick them with \c[1]C\c[0]
1092_22_3:
The rest of the world is still a work in progress,
come back when the full game releases!
1092_23_4:
\C[1]Skills\C[0] are grouped in two 
main categories: \C[2]Abilities\C[0] and \C[3]Magic\C[0]
1092_23_8:
\C[1]Abilities\C[0] uses AP that are
gained on each turn based on 
your \C[3]PSI\C[0] stat
1092_23_12:
\C[2]Magic\C[0] uses MP, there are
also hybrid abilities that uses
both MP and AP.
1092_25_5:
Use the \I[38]\C[1]Thinker\C[0] option in
the menu to start crafting and
disassembling items.
1092_25_10:
Every item needs a certain amount
of materials to be crafted.
The rarer the item the higher the amount
of materials needed.
1092_25_13:
You can also disassemble items you
no longer use to obtain some materials.
1092_25_16:
To collect materials slay monsters and
examine every nook and cranny of the world!
1092_26_6:
Use the\C[1]Computer\C[0] to
access the Hypernet, view the 
Stock market and many other 
marvelous things.
1092_26_11:
When investing remember this: \C[1]OIL\C[0]
is a extremely volatile stock,
\C[2]SOUL\C[0] is more stable but the value
can change based on current news.
1092_26_15:
\C[2]SOUL\C[0] price directly influence
the tariff on imported goods ordered
online.
1092_26_20:
The Omega Tower is designed by the
European Commission as a neutral zone
between the Hyperpowers and we get so
many combined tariffs!
1092_26_24:
Back to the explanation: when you have
ammassed a large amount of capital
you can try investing in \c[3]Real estate\c[0].
1092_26_29:
Buy properties around Europe and get
tenants that will pay a daily rent.
Price and attractiveness is influenced
by local news on the city you bought property.
1092_27_4:
During battle you can sever or destroy
the limbs of a enemy, affecting their stats.
1092_27_7:
If you sever a vital part of a enemy
during battle it will die in one hit.
1092_27_10:
Some enemies have multiple vital parts, such
as Hydras and double headed enemies.
1092_27_14:
You are also composed of squishy organs!
Enemy attacks can break your bones and
puncture your internal organs.
1092_27_17:
Check the \I[34]\C[1]Health Status\C[0] option
in menu do to a self check of you all body parts.
1092_27_21:
If you have too many broken parts
your stats will be reduced to a point
where you are useless in battle.
1092_27_24:
Be sure to heal them, rest or
visit a doctor before you die for real!
1092_28_4:
Check the blackboard to learn
about states, there are too many
to even begin remembering them...
1092_35_4:
Select \I[140]\c[1]Cooking\c[0] from main menu to
start cooking delicious meals for your party!
1092_35_8:
Just pick two ingredients at random: since
the Y2K event we lost all online recipes so
we need to start from the stone age of cooking.
1092_35_12:
Ever tried a Kebab Bolognese or some
Pinapple Krauts? You can also throw healing
items and drugs in the mix, you mileage may vary!
1092_35_15:
Check the \I[96] icon in the pause menu
to see how hungry you and your party is.
1092_37_4:
You can learn new skills by going in
the \I[34]\C[1]Training\C[0] of the main menu.
1092_37_9:
Skills that your class is proficient on
will have a learning speed bonus: 
\c[1]Primary skills\c[0] have a 4x bonus
and \c[1]Secondary skills\c[0] have a 2x bonus.
1092_37_13:
You can also learn skills outside your
class specialization but the learning
process will at nornal speed.
1092_37_16:
Find trainers and fight monsters to gain
experience in the currently trained skill.
1092_50_5:
Getting a lil' sleepy while deep into the Omega
Tower can be a death sentence, be sure to rest
regularly.
1092_50_8:
Find inns and beds to get a full rest, you can
also buy camp equipment to set up your camp.
1092_50_13:
The safest option is to sleep in the camp we set
in the elevator: monsters are repelled by the 
presence of the elevator and is the only reason
the Tower's base floor is not flooded with monsters.
1092_50_16:
You can also restore some sleep by drinking 
coffee or using stimulants and combat drugs.
1092_50_19:
Also...if you happen to become undead you will
no longer need to sleep.
1092_50_22:
Check the \I[66] icon in the pause menu
to see how sleepy you are.
1092_50_25:
Don't worry about me, i'll just watch you
ween you sleep :)
1092_53_4:
You can learn new skills by going in
the \C[1]Training\C[0] of the main menu.
1092_53_9:
Skills that your class is proficient on
will have a learning speed bonus: 
\c[1]Primary skills\c[0] have a 4x bonus
and \c[1]Secondary skills\c[0] have a 2x bonus.
1092_53_13:
You can also learn skills outside your
class specialization but the learning
process will at nornal speed.
1092_53_16:
Find trainers and fight monsters to gain
experience in the currently trained skill.

Visit magic shops to learn spells and buy
enchanted items.
